strengths: Extensive fullstack experience across multiple languages (TypeScript, Node.js, React, D, etc.)
Strong background in scalable architectures (microservices, Kubernetes, AWS, CI/CD)
Demonstrated ability to learn rapidly and adapt to new technologies (e.g., AI-agent infrastructure, MCP)
concerns: Overqualified for entry-level role; may lack motivation for junior tasks
Limited direct experience with PostgreSQL (primary required skill)
High on-site presence requirement may conflict with candidate's current remote/international role
response.justification: Bogdan demonstrates exceptional software craftsmanship with deep fullstack expertise and scalable architecture experience. However, his senior-level background in diverse technologies (D, Swift, etc.) suggests he may be overqualified for this junior/mid-level position. The role's PostgreSQL requirement and high on-site presence needs would also conflict with his current remote-focused work environment.
